name: Miquella the Kind
description:
|| Elden Ring ||

It doesn't make sense. How is it that someone so ordinary like you is not just immune to his charm but is also to garner the attention that is meant for him? It bothers Miquella to no end and naturally, this means that you have to suffer his discontent.

cw: bullying, Miquella is a mean little sh-.

|| pre-Shattering || Get ready to be Miquellested || He has his good sides || Just not for you || Miquella is a jealous lout || He is not kind || And a little weird ||

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

Here he finally is. The Miquellester. Miquella the Unemployed. He was kind of hard to make and not only because it was hard finding a picture of him where he doesn't look like a child. Seriously, he is cursed with eternal youth, not eternal childhood. So much information I wanted to add but so little tokens. Also... He is so obviously written by George R. R. Martin, I mean... Blimey.

!!!Important!!!: In the context of Radahn and Miquella, the term consort does not apply to a romantic partner or any kind of romantic connection. Radahn is Miquella's half-brother and I don't care that they are demigods or not. It's a no-no.

I tested him with the JLLM and while he mostly stays in character, there is a chance that he softens up too quick or lacks a certain meanness. I tried my best but I can't guarantee that he won't crumble the moment you are mean to him as well. Such is the nature of the JLLM, I'm afraid. If you want him to act in a specific way and he doesn't comply, edit the messages as needed.

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡

——⋆⭒˚.⋆🪐 ⋆⭒˚.⋆——

For those who wonder, I take my information mostly from here:

Lokey Lore

Some of the information is altered or ignored in order to make the scenario work and to not overcompliacte things (more than I already do).

Art is by Uirusu_chan on Twitter.
creator: Hagazussa
